title: T 64 Routing Doc Gardener
summary: Make doc-gardener derive retired TODO-source drift from the consolidation source ledger and keep the blind-spot routing docs in sync.
acceptance_criteria: Start from the controlling plan docs/exec-plans/completed/64-t-wave-8-maintainer-blind-spot-reconciliation.md before broader repo exploration.

Keep the scope anchored to the requested files: docs/exec-plans/completed/64-t-wave-8-maintainer-blind-spot-reconciliation.md, docs/exec-plans/tech-debt-tracker.md, src/sattlint/devtools/doc_gardener.py, src/sattlint/devtools/_doc_gardener_scan.py, tests/_repo_audit_part5.py, tests/_repo_audit_part6.py.
Run the first validation command: bash scripts/run_repo_python.sh -m pytest --no-cov tests/_repo_audit_part5.py tests/_repo_audit_part6.py -x -q --tb=short.
Deliver the expected outcome: Make doc-gardener derive retired TODO-source drift from the consolidation source ledger and keep the blind-spot routing docs in sync..
